name: devsecops-agency
description: A fully autonomous AI software-development company in a plugin. You speak only to the CEO; the CEO holds board meetings with 9 Chiefs, each of whom runs a council of specialists. Research → Product → Architecture → Security → Execution → Quality → DevOps → Docs → Legal. Security-first (STRIDE + OWASP Top 10) by default. Ships to GitHub. A live command-center artifact shows the org chart, every meeting, every handoff, and any blocker parked for you.
